parameters.query:
WITH dc AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.discovery_calls (opportunity_id, scheduled_at, ended_at, duration_min, external_event_id, meeting_url, attendees)
  VALUES ($1::bigint, $2::timestamptz, $3::timestamptz, $4::int, $5, $6, $7::jsonb)
  RETURNING id
), opp AS (
  UPDATE appdata.opportunities
  SET stage = 'badanie_potrzeb'
  WHERE id = $1::bigint
  RETURNING id, client_id
), owner AS (
  SELECT owner_user_id FROM appdata.clients WHERE id = (SELECT client_id FROM opp)
), task AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.tasks (entity_type, entity_id, assignee_user_id, title, stage_ref)
  VALUES ('opportunity', $1::bigint, (SELECT owner_user_id FROM owner), 'Wklej / zatwierdź transkrypcję — opportunity #' || $1::bigint, 'badanie_potrzeb')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM dc)   AS discovery_call_id,
  (SELECT id FROM opp)  AS opportunity_id,
  (SELECT id FROM task) AS task_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.body.opportunity_id, $json.body.scheduled_at || null, $json.body.ended_at || null, $json.body.duration_min || null, $json.body.external_event_id || null, $json.body.meeting_url || null, JSON.stringify($json.body.attendees || [])] }}
